title: Human Embryo or Blastoid Culture in Endometrial Scaffolds
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5cnp2","text":"This protocol is a part of our collection of protocols for culturing human embryos and human stem cell-derived blastoids in an endometrial culture system.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4bl76","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d0mjj","text":"This section covers the hormonal stimulation of the endometrial culture system in preparation for the transfer of the embryo or blastoid to the culture system, as well as the transfer of the embryo or blastoid and their ongoing culture.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"23ior","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fm2dq","text":"It assumes that you have already prepared the scaffold as described in the previous protocol referenced in first step and directs you to the protocols for preparing the embryo or blastoid for implantation once the culture system is ready to receive them. It is suggested that you read these protocols first so that you can have your embryos or blastoids ready to implant at the time when the culture system it ready for them.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Choose the system that you will be culturing on the scaffold
Scaffold System assembly is described in this protocol: Assembly of Endometrial Scaffold Systems by Richard J Acton
Human Embryo Thawing by Richard J Acton
Begin by generating the blastoids: Generation of Blastoids by Richard J Acton
Solution Preparation

Replace media in upper and lower compartments every 48:00:00 for a total of 8 days. It is important to clean the surface of the epithelium because of the accumulation of sediments. Under a stereoscope, pipette gently to lift up any sediments and remove all medium and, if necessary, wash the epithelial surface with Advanced DMEM/F-12 to remove any residual sediment, and then add fresh medium.
Begin by following the protocol for Human Embryo Thawing: Human Embryo Thawing by Richard J Acton
Transfer day 5 embryos into endometrial scaffolds.
Optionally remove the zona pellucida by briefly treating the embryos with Acidified Tyrodes Solution Cooper Surgical Catalog #10605000

HEM-1 is used for the culture of embryos from 5 d.p.f. to 9 d.p.f. HEM-2 is used for the culture of embryos from 9 d.p.f. to 12 d.p.f. HEM-3 is used for the culture of embryos from 12 d.p.f. to 14 d.p.f. Replace half volume of each HEM medium daily with fresh medium.

At 96:00:00 , transfer blastoids into the upper compartment of the endometrial scaffolds using a micropipetter (Origio, MXL3-STR-CGR) and micropipetter flexible tips (Origio, MXL3-275). Equipment: The Stripper micropipettor with Comfort Grip ( micropipettor, Origio, MXL3-STR-CGR, MXL3-275 tips, https://fertility.coopersurgical.com/wp-content/uploads/Stripper_EZ-range_US_v3_web-1.pdf ) Transfer one or more blastoids into each scaffold. The upper compartment should contain 300 µL of HEM-1 HEM-1 is used for the culture of blastoids for the first four days. HEM-2 is used for the culture of blastoids for the following three days. HEM-3 is used for the culture of blastoids for the next three days after that. Replace half volume of each HEM medium daily with fresh medium. Monitor cultures daily and stop desired end point.

Pre-equilibrate the media in the upper and lower compartments of the transwell for 03:00:00 before transfer of the embryo or blastoid to the endometrial scaffold. Culture conditions are the following: 37 °C , 20% O 2 and 5% CO 2 The media in the upper compartment is termed H uman E mbryo M edium (HEM) . Variations in the composition of HEM are used to support embryos and blastoids at different stages of post-implantation culture. HEM-1 is used to culture embryos from 5 d.p.f. to 9 d.p.f. (days post-fertilisation) and blastoids at equivalent stages; HEM-2 from from 9 d.p.f. to 12 d.p.f.; and HEM-3 from 12 d.p.f. to 14 d.p.f.. HEM-1 should be changed once every 48h, HEM-2 & HEM-3 once every 24h, replacing half the volume on each change . HEM-1 is initially supplied at 300μL per transwell, HEM-2 at 350μL, & HEM-3 at 400μL HEM-1, HEM-2 and HEM-3 should be prepared fresh on the day of use . After combining all of the ingredients, centrifuge the media 200 x g, °C, 3 minutes to pellet any precipitates from the serum. Throughout the entire culture, the lower compartment of the transwell culture system contains 1 mL Stromal Medium (2% FBS +E2 +P4). Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11500446 N-2 Gibco™ N-2 Supplement (100X) Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11520536 (17502048) L-glutamine L-Glutamine (200mM) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #25030024 Penicillin-Streptomycin Gibco™ Penicillin-Streptomycin (10,000 U/mL) Fisher Scientific Catalog #15-140-122 NAC N-Acetyl-L-cysteine Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A9165 (CAS: 616-91-1) Nicotinamide Nicotinamide Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #N0636 CS FBS Fetal Bovine Serum (USA origin, Charcoal Stripped, sterile-filtered, suitable for cell culture) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #F6765 HSA Human serum albumin solution (100 mg/mL) Vitrolife Catalog #10064 Hyaluronic acid sodium salt Hyaluronic acid sodium salt, Extracellular matrix componen Abcam Catalog #ab143634 (CAS: 9067-32-7) E2 intermediate solution (see step 2.3) P4 stock solution (see step 2.3) Prolactin Recombinant Human Prolactin peprotech Catalog #100-07 HCG Human Chorionic Gonadotropin (HCG) Alpha Diagnostic International Catalog #RP-1484 HPL Recombinant Human Placental Lactogen/CSH1 Protein R&D Systems Catalog #5757-PL-025/CF IGF-1 Recombinant Human IGF-1 Cell Guidance Systems Catalog #GFH34AF EGF Epidermal growth factor peprotech Catalog #AF-100-15 DMSO Dimethyl sulfoxide (DMSO) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #34869 Deionised water such as Distilled Water Thermo Fisher Catalog #15230089 PBS DPBS with MgCl2 and CaCl2 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D8662 BSA Gibco™ Bovine Albumin Fraction V (7.5% solution) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15260037 Stock Solution Preparation: 0.1 Mass Percent BSA in PBS : Add 133 µL BSA to 10 mL of PBS (final concentration equivalent to 0.1g in 100mL PBS). Filter sterilise. Store at 4°C for up to two weeks 500mM N-Acetyl-L-cysteine (NAC) : Dissolve 2.5 g NAC in 30.64 mL Deionised water . Filter sterilise. Store in 0.5 mL aliquots at -20 °C or -80 °C 1M Nicotinamide : Dissolve 1.22 g in 10 mL Deionised water . Filter sterilise. Store in 0.5 mL aliquots at -20 °C or -80 °C 5mg/mL Hyaluronic acid sodium salt: Dissolve 500 mg in 100 mL DMEM/F-12 . Store in 0.5 mL aliquots at -20 °C or -80 °C 50μg/mL Prolactin : Dissolve 100 µg of Prolactin powder in 2 mL 0.1 Mass Percent BSA in PBS . Store at -80 °C as single use aliquots. 1mg/mL HCG : Dissolve 2.5 mg of HCG powder in 2.5 mL 0.1 Mass Percent BSA in PBS . Store at -80 °C as single use aliquots. 50μg/mL HPL: Dissolve 25 µg of HPL powder in 0.5 mL, PBS . Store at -80 °C as single use aliquots. 100μg/mL IGF-1 : Dissolve 100 µg IGF-1 in 1 mL 0.1 Mass Percent BSA in PBS . Store in 25 µL aliquots at -20 °C or -80 °C 100μg/mL EGF : Dissolve 100 µg EGF in 1 mL 0.1 Mass Percent BSA in PBS . Store in 25 µL aliquots at -20 °C or -80 °C To make up 1 mL of HEM-2 : %s %s HEM-2 requires adjustment to neutral pH, until the medium has turned from yellow to pink, using sodium bicarbonate buffer solution such as: Sodium bicarbonate, 1M buffer soln. Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #J62495.AP (CAS: 144-55-8) . Additional reagents: D-( )-Glucose solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G8644 Insulin-Transferrin-Selenium-Ethanolamine (ITS -X) (100X) Thermo Fisher Catalog #51500056 MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids Solution (100X) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #11140035 MEM Amino Acids Solution (50X) Thermo Fisher Catalog #11130036 Y-27632 (Dihydrochloride) 1 mg STEMCELL Technologies Inc. Catalog #72302 To make up 1 mL of HEM-3 : %s %s HEM-3 requires adjustment to neutral pH, until the medium has turned from yellow to pink, using sodium bicarbonate buffer solution such as: Sodium bicarbonate, 1M buffer soln. Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #J62495.AP (CAS: 144-55-8) . Stromal Medium (2% FBS + E2 + P4): Dilute: 10 µL of 1 micromolar (µM) E2 intermediate solution 1 µL of 1 millimolar (mM) P4 stock solution in 1 mL Stromal Medium (2% FBS). Make fresh on the day of use.

Second, mimic the mid-secretory phase by stimulating the endometrial cells in the transwell with with β-oestradiol (E2), progesterone (P4) and 8-bromoadenosine 3′, 5′-cyclic monophosphate (cAMP) for 8 days: Add: 250 µL of Organoid Medium (2% FBS + E2 + P4 + cAMP) to the upper compartment 1 mL of Stromal medium (2% FBS + E2 + P4 +cAMP) to lower compartment
Replace media in both compartments 48:00:00
Replace media in both compartments 48:00:00

Hormone stimulate the endometrial model to mimic the proliferative and mid-secretory phases of the human endometrial cycle. First, mimic the proliferative phase by stimulating the endometrial cells in the transwell with β-oestradiol (E2) for 4 days: Add: 250 µL of Organoid Medium (2% FBS + E2) to the upper compartment 1 mL of Stromal medium (2% FBS + E2) to lower compartment

Stromal Medium (2% FBS) (50mL): A B C D 1 Reagents Stock Concentration Volume (mL) Final Concentration 2 DMEM/F-12 1x 48.4 0.97x 3 CS FBS 100% 1 2% 4 L-Glutamine 200mM 0.5 2mM 5 Penicillin / Streptomycin 10000U/mL 0.1 20U/mL Reagents: DMEM/F-12 Advanced DMEM/F-12 Thermo Fisher Catalog #12634010 CS FBS Fetal Bovine Serum (USA origin, Charcoal Stripped, sterile-filtered, suitable for cell culture) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #F6765 L-Glutamine L-Glutamine (200mM) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #25030024 Penicillin / Streptomycin Gibco™ Penicillin-Streptomycin (10,000 U/mL) Fisher Scientific Catalog #15-140-122

Organoid Medium (2% FBS) (50mL): A B C D 1 Reagents Stock Concentration Volume (mL) Final Concentration 2 Organoid Medium 1x 49 0.98x 3 CS FBS 100% 1 2% Reagents: Organoid Medium from Step 2 of the protocol: "Isolation of Stromal and Epithelial Cells from Human Endometrial Biopsies". CS FBS Fetal Bovine Serum (USA origin, Charcoal Stripped, sterile-filtered, suitable for cell culture) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #F6765

E2, P4 and cAMP solutions: E2 stock solution 1 millimolar (mM), β-oestradiol : Dissolve 125 mg of β-Estradiol Water Soluble Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #E4389 powder, (which contains 6 mg of E2) in 22 mL, deionised water . Store at -80 °C as single use aliquots. E2 intermediate solution 1 micromolar (µM) β-oestradiol : Dilute 1 µL of 1 millimolar (mM) E2 stock solution in 1 mL DMEM/F-12. P4 stock solution 1 millimolar (mM), Progesterone : Dissolve 125 mg of Progesterone Water Soluble Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #p7556 powder, (which contains 8.75 mg of P4) in 27.825 mL, deionised water . Store at -80 °C as single use aliquots. cAMP stock solution 1 millimolar (mM), cAMP 8-Bromoadenosine 3′,5′-cyclic monophosphate sodium salt (cAMP) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #b7880 Dissolve 25 mg of powder in 58.12 mL, deionised water . Store at -80 °C as single use aliquots. Reagents: Deionised water , such as Distilled Water Thermo Fisher Catalog #15230089 DMEM/F-12 Advanced DMEM/F-12 Thermo Fisher Catalog #12634010
Organoid Medium (2% FBS + E2): Dilute 10 µL of 1 micromolar (µM) E2 intermediate solution in 1 mL Organoid Medium (2% FBS). Make fresh on the day of use.
Stromal medium 2% FBS + E2: Dilute 10 µL of 1 micromolar (µM) E2 intermediate solution in 1 mL Stromal Medium (2% FBS) . Make fresh on the day of use.

Organoid Medium (2% FBS + E2 + P4 + cAMP): Dilute: 10 µL of 1 micromolar (µM) E2 intermediate solution 1 µL of 1 millimolar (mM) P4 stock solution 1 µL of 1 millimolar (mM) cAMP stock solution in 1 mL Organoid Medium (2% FBS). Make fresh on the day of use.

Stromal Medium (2% FBS + E2 + P4 + cAMP): Dilute: 10 µL of 1 micromolar (µM) E2 intermediate solution 1 µL of 1 millimolar (mM) P4 stock solution 1 µL of 1 millimolar (mM) cAMP stock solution in 1 mL Stromal Medium (2% FBS). Make fresh on the day of use.
creator: Richard J Acton
